name: Invoice misvaluation
body: Systematic over- or under-pricing of cross-border goods to move value.

name: Phantom-shipment cycles
body: Trade finance extended against goods that never ship — or that ship repeatedly.

name: Third-party pass-through
body: Beneficial ownership obscured through intermediaries in low-transparency jurisdictions.

name: Channel stuffing
body: Revenue recognition pulled forward through inventory pushed to captive distributors.

name: Round-tripping
body: Funds exit and re-enter via offshore vehicles to reclassify source or purpose.

name: Procurement collusion
body: Repeated bid patterns consistent with information leakage or allocation.

name: Shell layering
body: Entity chains registered and dissolved within transaction windows.

name: Sanctions masking
body: Counterparty substitution or intermediary insertion to obscure restricted parties.
